llvm::GCRelocateOperands Class Reference

#include <Statepoint.h>

Public Member Functions

 GCRelocateOperands (const User *U)
 GCRelocateOperands (const Instruction *inst)
 GCRelocateOperands (CallSite CS)
const Instruction * statepoint ()
 The statepoint with which this gc.relocate is associated.
int basePtrIndex ()
int derivedPtrIndex ()
Value * basePtr ()
Value * derivedPtr ()

Detailed Description

Wraps a call to a gc.relocate and provides access to it's operands. TODO: This should likely be refactored to resememble the wrappers in InstrinsicInst.h.

Definition at line 176 of file Statepoint.h.

◆ basePtrIndex()

int llvm::GCRelocateOperands::basePtrIndex ( )
inline

The index into the associate statepoint's argument list which contains the base pointer of the pointer whose relocation this gc.relocate describes.
